title: 敬愛を抱きて誠意尽くすが礼

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On her way to training, Yaeno Muteki spots
Mejiro Ardan looking like her legs are in pain.
Yaeno rushes over to help her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ardan explains that she's made up her mind to
race at the Japanese Derby, even if it means
risking her life. Winning will prove to the world
that she existed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, Sakura Chiyono O is
intensifying her training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She carries the hopes of Maruzensky, the racer
she admires above all others. More determined
than ever, she aims to win the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having witnessed the resolve of her two rivals,
Yaeno Muteki steels herself once more, and she
throws herself into training with a renewed vigor.
